case_title: KYLE FLORES VS. ARTURO LARA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY FLORES, KYLE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ARTURO LARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF KYLE FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTURO LARA GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $150 SERVED SEP-07-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ARTURO LARA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ARTURO LARA $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
